p.style: border: black 1px dotted; background-color: #EEEEEE; padding: 8px; margin-bottom: 8px

div.p: Expansion performed internally based on codesystem Attachment Tag CodeSystem v1.0.0 (CodeSystem)
This value set contains 3 concepts

tr.td: Inline data externalized and saved as file

div.p: Indicates that the Attachment content was originally available as inline data/blob content but has been externalized and saved as a file in object storage, with the Attachment.url carrying the storage location.
If this tag is absent, the content SHALL be assumed to have originated as an external file rather than inline data.

button.data-clipboard-text: {"system": "http://314e.com/fhir/CodeSystem/attachment-tag", "version": "1.0.0", "code": "inline-data-externalized-to-file", "display": "Inline data externalized and saved as file"}
button.title: Click to Copy as Coding

button.data-clipboard-text: <coding><system value="http://314e.com/fhir/CodeSystem/attachment-tag"><version value="1.0.0"><code value="inline-data-externalized-to-file"><display value="Inline data externalized and saved as file"></coding>
button.title: Click to Copy as Coding

tr.td: Duplicate of another attachment on the same element

div.p: Indicates that this attachment was created as a duplicate of the content in another attachment on the same element for some reason, for example because the same content needed to be stored as two different content types.

button.data-clipboard-text: {"system": "http://314e.com/fhir/CodeSystem/attachment-tag", "version": "1.0.0", "code": "duplicate", "display": "Duplicate of another attachment on the same element"}
button.title: Click to Copy as Coding

button.data-clipboard-text: <coding><system value="http://314e.com/fhir/CodeSystem/attachment-tag"><version value="1.0.0"><code value="duplicate"><display value="Duplicate of another attachment on the same element"></coding>
button.title: Click to Copy as Coding

div.p: Indicates to the consumer application that this attachment should not be used even though it exists in the data.
This may be used to identify the preferred/usable attachment when multiple copies of equivalent content are available.

button.data-clipboard-text: <coding><system value="http://314e.com/fhir/CodeSystem/attachment-tag"><version value="1.0.0"><code value="hidden"><display value="Hidden from application use"></coding>
button.title: Click to Copy as Coding

display.value: Inline data externalized and saved as file
Duplicate of another attachment on the same element

p.style: border: black 1px dotted; background-color: #EEEEEE; padding: 8px; margin-bottom: 8px

div.p: Expansion performed internally based on codesystem Attachment Tag CodeSystem v1.0.0 (CodeSystem)
This value set contains 3 concepts

tr.td: Inline data externalized and saved as file

div.p: Indicates that the Attachment content was originally available as inline data/blob content but has been externalized and saved as a file in object storage, with the Attachment.url carrying the storage location.
If this tag is absent, the content SHALL be assumed to have originated as an external file rather than inline data.

button.data-clipboard-text: {"system": "http://314e.com/fhir/CodeSystem/attachment-tag", "version": "1.0.0", "code": "inline-data-externalized-to-file", "display": "Inline data externalized and saved as file"}

button.title: Click to Copy as Coding

tr.td: Duplicate of another attachment on the same element

div.p: Indicates that this attachment was created as a duplicate of the content in another attachment on the same element for some reason, for example because the same content needed to be stored as two different content types.

button.data-clipboard-text: {"system": "http://314e.com/fhir/CodeSystem/attachment-tag", "version": "1.0.0", "code": "duplicate", "display": "Duplicate of another attachment on the same element"}
button.title: Click to Copy as Coding

button.data-clipboard-text: <coding><system value="http://314e.com/fhir/CodeSystem/attachment-tag"><version value="1.0.0"><code value="duplicate"><display value="Duplicate of another attachment on the same element"></coding>
button.title: Click to Copy as Coding

div.p: Indicates to the consumer application that this attachment should not be used even though it exists in the data.
This may be used to identify the preferred/usable attachment when multiple copies of equivalent content are available.

button.data-clipboard-text: <coding><system value="http://314e.com/fhir/CodeSystem/attachment-tag"><version value="1.0.0"><code value="hidden"><display value="Hidden from application use"></coding>
button.title: Click to Copy as Coding

display.value: Inline data externalized and saved as file
Duplicate of another attachment on the same element

p.style: border: black 1px dotted; background-color: #EEEEEE; padding: 8px; margin-bottom: 8px

div.p: Expansion performed internally based on codesystem 314e Procedure Category CodeSystem v1.0.0 (CodeSystem)
This value set contains 5 concepts

button.data-clipboard-text: <coding><system value="http://314e.com/fhir/CodeSystem/procedure-category-314e"><version value="1.0.0"><code value="BBTM"><display value="Transfusion Medicine / Blood Bank"></coding>
button.title: Click to Copy as Coding

p.style: border: black 1px dotted; background-color: #EEEEEE; padding: 8px; margin-bottom: 8px

div.p: Expansion performed internally based on codesystem 314e Procedure Category CodeSystem v1.0.0 (CodeSystem)
This value set contains 5 concepts

button.data-clipboard-text: <coding><system value="http://314e.com/fhir/CodeSystem/procedure-category-314e"><version value="1.0.0"><code value="BBTM"><display value="Transfusion Medicine / Blood Bank"></coding>
button.title: Click to Copy as Coding

p.style: border: black 1px dotted; background-color: #EEEEEE; padding: 8px; margin-bottom: 8px

div.p: Expansion performed internally based on codesystem Observation Tag CodeSystem v1.0.0 (CodeSystem)
This value set contains 2 concepts

tr.td: Top-level resource with no parents of its own

div.p: Indicates that, within the hierarchy of resources created through parent-child relationships, this resource occupies the top level and itself has no parent resource.

button.data-clipboard-text: {"system": "http://314e.com/fhir/CodeSystem/observation-tag", "version": "1.0.0", "code": "super-resource", "display": "Top-level resource with no parents of its own"}
button.title: Click to Copy as Coding

button.data-clipboard-text: <coding><system value="http://314e.com/fhir/CodeSystem/observation-tag"><version value="1.0.0"><code value="super-resource"><display value="Top-level resource with no parents of its own"></coding>
button.title: Click to Copy as Coding

div.p: Indicates that neither this resource nor any recursive descendant resource bears a result or report.

display.value: Top-level resource with no parents of its own

p.style: border: black 1px dotted; background-color: #EEEEEE; padding: 8px; margin-bottom: 8px
